src: Effortlessly request recommended movies, TV shows and anime to Jellyseer/Overseer based on your recently watched content on Jellyfin, Plex or Emby—let SuggestArr handle it all automatically, keeping your library fresh with new and exciting content!
ja: Jellyfin、Plex、Emby の視聴履歴をもとに、おすすめの映画・TV 番組・アニメを Jellyseer/Overseer へ自動でリクエスト。SuggestArr がすべて自動処理し、ライブラリを常に新鮮なコンテンツで満たします。
